name: JANEL CORP
summary: Janel Corporation is a Nevada-incorporated holding company headquartered in New York, NY, operating three segments: Logistics, Life Sciences, and Manufacturing. Its Logistics segment provides freight forwarding (air, ocean, land), customs brokerage, warehousing, and distribution. Life Sciences manufactures and distributes antibodies and research/diagnostic reagents. Manufacturing, via Indco, produces mixing equipment. Janel also holds approximately 46.6% of Rubicon Technology, an advanced materials provider specializing in monocrystalline sapphire.

products.name: Freight Forwarding
products.description: Air, ocean, and land-based cargo transportation forwarding services for customers globally.

products.name: Customs Brokerage
products.description: Customs entry filing and related compliance services for imported and exported goods.

products.name: Warehousing and Distribution
products.description: Warehousing, hazardous material storage, distribution, and product repackaging services.

products.name: Antibodies and Research Reagents
products.description: Manufactures and distributes antibodies, diagnostic reagents, and custom biotech services.

products.name: Mixing Equipment
products.description: Indco manufactures and distributes mixing equipment and apparatuses for various industries.
